pr.title: feat: Add Dashboard link and update Login to new auth system in nav
pr.body: ## Summary Adds a **Dashboard** link and updates the **Login** button in the main site navigation (`index.html`) to point to the new Firebase auth system pages (merged in PR #1). **Changes to `index.html` nav bar:** - Added `Dashboard` link (`/user-dashboard/index.html`) with a chart icon — lets users access their performance dashboard directly from the homepage - Updated `Login` button from `/secure/login.html` → `/auth/login.html` — points to the new auth login page with Firebase integration ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Visit the site and verify the nav bar shows "Dashboard" and "Login" links - [ ] Click "Dashboard" — if logged in, shows dashboard; if not, redirects to `/auth/login.html` - [ ] Click "Login" — opens the new Firebase auth login page (not the old `/secure/login.html`) - [ ] Verify mobile nav (hamburger menu) also shows both links correctly ### Notes - The old `/secure/login.html` login page still exists and is accessible directly, but the nav now points to the new auth system - If deploying via GitHub Pages, remember to add your domain to Firebase Authorized Domains Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/1057794bd9864ce1b0ad50ed63e81f76 Requested by: @Shyamsundar98152 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
